scripts.build:portable: npm run build:frontend && uv run python -m backend.packaging.release_builder portable
scripts.build:installer: npm run build:frontend && uv run python -m backend.packaging.release_builder installer
scripts.build:release: npm run build:frontend && uv run python -m backend.packaging.release_builder all
scripts.test:backend: uv run python -m unittest discover -s backend/tests -v
scripts.test:backend:engines: uv run python -m unittest discover -s backend/tests/engines -v
